text.title: Figma AI Ecosystem Map Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to apply the figma-ai-ecosystem methodology end-to-end.

step.name: snapshot-current-state
step.action: Enumerate first-party AI surfaces with current state (GA, beta, EAP).

step.name: map-capabilities-and-data-flow
step.action: Per surface: capability, where data flows, GA/beta status, regression risk.
step.decision-gate: If any surface ships data outside the AI-policy boundary, flag at risk-high.

step.name: layer-on-plugin-surface
step.input: Capability matrix + plugin ecosystem methodology output
step.action: Layer the plugin shortlist on top. Mark overlaps where plugin duplicates first-party feature.

step.name: synthesize-risk-and-write
step.action: Compose ecosystem-report.md with executive summary + adoption recommendations + 30-day watchlist.
